sizing_rule.note: Trade 1 contract per $6,585.44 (parametric optimal f using Normal Distribution) or per $7,918.04 (empirical optimization). Formula: Number of Contracts = Account Equity / Optimal f Dollar Amount. Author recommends empirical method ($7,918.04) for better accuracy over parametric method.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every $6,585.44 in account equity using the Normal Distribution parametric optimal f technique, though empirical optimization suggests 1 contract per $7,918.04 for better accuracy.
